## Session — 2026-04-28 14:00

Deployed the updated Docker Compose configuration for the embedding service. The new setup uses a multi-stage build to reduce image size by 40 percent. Verified that the health check endpoint responds within the expected timeout.

### Decisions

- [decision] Use multi-stage Docker builds for all service images
- [decision] Health check interval set to 30 seconds with a 5-second timeout

### Pending Items

- [pending] Configure volume mounts for persistent vector storage
- [pending] Test the backup and restore procedure for the SQLite database

### Actions

- [action: agent-beta] Write a migration script for the content_vectors table schema change
- [action: agent-alpha] Review the updated deployment architecture diagram

### Notes

Infrastructure session focused on container orchestration. The embedding service now starts reliably in under 10 seconds. Discussed the need for a proper CI integration test stage that runs against real data rather than mocks alone. The team agreed that synthetic fixtures would provide a good balance between speed and realism.
